'''zamacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumatosaccus|pneumatosaccus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-m-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumatosaccus|pneumatosaccus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zamacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæmæchæth|zæmæchæth]] || [[word:zæmæchæj|zæmæchæj]] || [[word:zæmæchæsh|zæmæchæsh]] || [[word:zæmæchæ|zæmæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zamamachath|zamamachath]] || [[word:zamamachaj|zamamachaj]] || [[word:zamamachash|zamamachash]] || [[word:zamamacha|zamamacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zamachath|zamachath]] || [[word:zamachaj|zamachaj]] || [[word:zamachash|zamachash]] || [[word:zamacha|zamacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zamafchath|zamafchath]] || [[word:zamafchaj|zamafchaj]] || [[word:zamafchash|zamafchash]] || [[word:zamafchaf|zamafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zamachatha|zamachatha]] || [[word:zamachaja|zamachaja]] || [[word:zamachasha|zamachasha]] || [[word:zamachaka|zamachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zamachath|zamachath]] || [[word:zamachaj|zamachaj]] || [[word:zamachash|zamachash]] || [[word:zamacha|zamacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zamachathal|zamachathal]] || [[word:zamachajal|zamachajal]] || [[word:zamachashal|zamachashal]] || [[word:zamachakal|zamachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zamachathatha|zamachathatha]] || [[word:zamachajaja|zamachajaja]] || [[word:zamachashasha|zamachashasha]] || [[word:zamachaka|zamachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zamachathan|zamachathan]] || [[word:zamachajan|zamachajan]] || [[word:zamachashan|zamachashan]] || [[word:zamachakan|zamachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zamachathaoro|zamachathaoro]] || [[word:zamachajaoro|zamachajaoro]] || [[word:zamachashaoro|zamachashaoro]] || [[word:zamachakaoro|zamachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
